calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel C. Scanlan, in pro per, Tel. 415.297.0878, for defendants.
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The Court required parties to appear. The matter was discussed. Defendant's Claim Of Exemption is granted. Order signed and mailed to parties. Judge Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/SB)
